learningGoal: A first-time visitor understands what Prime Self gives them immediately, why it feels different, and why starting now is easy.
keyPoints: Prime Self turns your birth date, time, and location into a Free Energy Blueprint in seconds
You see your Energy Type, Strategy, Authority, defined centers, and gates without needing to decode chart jargon alone
The Synthesis combines Human Design, Frequency Keys, and natal astrology into one clear reading you can actually use
You can start free, get your chart fast, and keep going deeper with daily transits, relationship insight, and practitioner support
script: Your pattern becomes clear fast. Prime Self turns your birth date, time, and location into a Free Energy Blueprint you can read in plain language. You see your Energy Type, your Strategy, your Authority, and the gates shaping how you work, relate, and decide. Then the Synthesis connects Human Design, Frequency Keys, and natal astrology into one reading you can actually use. Start free, get your chart in seconds, and decide from something real.
toneNotes: Homepage welcome video. The first sentence must hook with speed and clarity. Focus on what the viewer sees and understands, not abstract self-discovery language. End with a clean invitation to start free now.
